category_sources: source_facts.description describes Gemmi as a macromolecular crystallography library and utilities.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies gemmi; official documentation uses the display name Gemmi.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official Gemmi site; official documentation page describes Gemmi and lists the source repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/project-gemmi/gemmi, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies macromolecular crystallography; official Gemmi documentation describes structural biology, mmCIF/PDB, MTZ, maps, symmetry, and CIF parsing.
